get_profile: get the active feature profile from the CODER_PROFILE environment variable or default to standard
is_feature_enabled: check if a feature group like browser or web_tools is enabled with env override support
describe_profile: describe all feature groups and their enabled status for a named profile or the active one
list_profiles: list all built-in profile names like minimal standard and full available in the system
reset_profile: reset the cached feature profile to force re-resolution from environment variables on next call
